team.date_founded: Founded on Pluto in the first age of outer-system football, once a giant of the game and never quite over it.
team.number_of_fans: Around 9 million proud, wounded supporters who remember the glory days.
team.badge: A frozen heart-shaped glacier beneath a faded crown.
team.home_kit: Frost-white and pale blue with a faded-crown crest.
team.away_kit: Ice-grey with a thin blue heart motif.
team.third_kit: Deep nitrogen-blue with a cracked-crown emblem.
team.history: Pluto Frost are the fallen giants of the outer system — once the grandest club beyond the asteroid belt, now a proud, defensive side clinging to former glory. Their fans carry a grievance the size of a planet, and every win feels like a small reclamation of lost status.
team.club_culture: Proud, wounded, and defiantly nostalgic. The Demoted believe they belong among the elite and intend to climb back.
team.political_leaning: Kuiper-restorationist — a club that wants its old standing back.
trophy_cabinet: A glittering historic honours board, dusty but proud
legends: Tombaugh Crane — the legendary forward of the club's golden age
achievements: Most historic trophies of any Kuiper club

stadium.date_built: A grand old ground from the club's golden age, lovingly preserved.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by Pluto's old institutions and proud heritage funds.
stadium.pitch_size: Full regulation, maintained as a monument to past glory.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the deep nitrogen cold.
stadium.bio: The Deep Freeze is a grand, faded cathedral of a ground, far larger than the club's current standing warrants. The old crowd's roar still carries the memory of greatness.

training_facility.date_built: A standard complex, a step down from the club's grand past.
training_facility.bio: The Frost Academy drills disciplined, defensive football — the pragmatic creed of a proud club rebuilding from reduced means toward the heights it once knew.

manager.appearance: Dignified and severe, carries the weight of the club's history on his shoulders.
manager.bio: Glacis Montoya is a defensive pragmatist tasked with restoring a fallen giant. He builds disciplined, hard-to-beat sides and dreams of marching the Demoted back toward the glory their fans never stop demanding.
manager.personality: Proud, disciplined, and burdened by expectation.
manager.playing_history: A defender from the tail end of the club's golden era.
manager.playing_philosophy: Be solid, be disciplined, and rebuild from the back. Glory is reclaimed one clean sheet at a time.
achievements: Steadied the fallen giant and halted its decline

managing_staff.appearance: Hardy and exacting, drills the squad in the cryogenic cold.
managing_staff.bio: Frost Bergman builds the cryo-adapted fitness that lets the Demoted endure the deep freeze and outlast opponents in the cold.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Endure the cold and you endure the match.

players.appearance: Solid and commanding, the proud last line.
players.bio: Cryo Vasquez is the balanced keeper who anchors the Demoted's disciplined defence.
achievements: Most clean sheets in the side

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Permafrost Cruz is the workhorse full-back who covers the channel without rest.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the proud organiser.
players.bio: Frost Kane is the team-first defender who marshals the Demoted's disciplined line.
Glacial Sato is the aggressive defender who supplies the steel behind the proud rebuild.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.bio: Arctic Lee is the composed defender who keeps the Demoted solid as they rebuild.

players.appearance: Inventive and proud, the creative hope.
players.bio: Charon Kim is the creative spark the Demoted pin their dreams of revival on.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.bio: Styx Mori is the team-first midfielder who screens the proud old defence.
Nix Nakamura is the composed midfielder who keeps the Demoted ticking through the rebuild.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Sharp and proud, the finisher carrying the legacy.
players.bio: Nyx Rivera is the selfish striker who shoulders the weight of the club's goalscoring heritage.

players.appearance: Direct and willing, the running forward.
players.bio: Hydra Patel is the aggressive forward who stretches defences for the proud Demoted.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide threat.
players.bio: Kerberos Novak is the selfish wide forward who provides the cutting edge in the rebuild.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Cerberus Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Polar Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the line solid in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Boreas Martinez is the promising young defender the Demoted hope will restore their glory.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Kelvin Chandra is the creative deputy who offers a spark of the old flair from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Zero Ito is the eager young finisher dreaming of restoring the Demoted to greatness.
